name: www.garbinc.com
message: [AI generated] Garb Oil & Power Corporation (www.garbinc.com) is a company specialized in the recycling and clean energy sector. It focuses on the production of machines for waste processing and recycling. Catering to both individual and industrial clients, Garb offers comprehensive solutions in recycling processes. Notably, Garb leads a responsible approach to waste processing and environmental sustainability. The company is based in Salt Lake City, Utah, USA.
